title: Swap16/Swap32 mishandle certain SPS payloads
body: src/demux/flv-demuxer.js's Swap16/Swap32 helpers are used while parsing AVC sequence headers; streams from some encoders that already store SPS/PPS length fields in the expected order get double-swapped, breaking NALU length parsing and causing silent playback failure.

title: WebSocket loader doesn't reconnect after a dropped connection
body: src/io/websocket-loader.js has no retry logic, so a brief network interruption during a live stream permanently halts playback instead of attempting to reconnect the way fetch-stream-loader.js can recover from transient errors.

title: Silent-frame insertion causes an audible click
body: src/remux/mp4-remuxer.js uses remux/aac-silent.js to fill audio gaps during network stalls, but the inserted silent frames aren't crossfaded with surrounding audio, producing a noticeable click at each gap boundary.

title: config.js flags like enableWorker aren't documented
body: src/config.js defines several tuning flags (enableWorker, enableStashBuffer, and others) with no accompanying explanation of their effect on playback, so integrators are left guessing when tuning latency.
